title: ligusticum obtusifolium
intro: Ligusticum obtusifolium is a plant species, also known as Chinese Lovage or Chinese Chervil, which belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ligusticum obtusifolium include relieving digestive problems, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Ligusticum obtusifolium include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be obtained through drying and processing the plant's leaves, roots, and stems.
